segments.text: "The Lord told Moses,
Instruct the Israelites to bring me an offering. You are to receive my offering from everyone who willingly wants to give.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: These are the items you are to accept from them as contributions: gold, silver, and bronze;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: blue, purple, and crimson thread; finely-spun linen and goat hair;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: ram skins that have been tanned, and fine leather; acacia wood;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: olive oil for the lamps; spices for the olive oil used in anointing and for the fragrant incense;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and onyx stones and other gemstones to be used in making the ephod and breastpiece.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to make me a sanctuary so I can live among them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You must make the Tabernacle and all its furnishings according to the design I'm going to show you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to make an Ark of acacia wood that measures two and a half cubits long by a cubit and a half wide by one and a half cubits high.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Cover it with pure gold on the inside and the outside, and make a gold trim to go around it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Cast four gold rings and attach them to its four feet, two on one side and two on the other.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make poles of acacia wood and cover them with gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Place the poles into the rings on the sides of the Ark, so it can be carried.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The poles are to stay in the rings of the Ark; don't take them out.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Place inside the Ark the Testimony which I'm going to give you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You are to make an atonement cover of pure gold, two and a half cubits long by a cubit and a half wide.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make two cherubim of hammered gold for the ends of the atonement cover,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and put one cherub on each end. All of this is to be made from one piece of gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The cherubim are to be designed with spread wings pointing upward, covering the atonement cover. The cherubim are to be placed facing each another, looking down towards the atonement cover.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Place the atonement cover on top of the Ark, and put the Testimony that I'm going to give you inside the Ark.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will meet with you there as arranged above the atonement cover, between the two cherubim that st and over the Ark of the Testimony, and I will talk with you about all the commands I will give the Israelites.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then you are to make a table of acacia wood two cubits long by a cubit wide by a cubit and a half high.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Cover it with pure gold and make a gold trim to go around it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make a border around it the width of a hand and put a gold trim on the border.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make four gold rings for the table and attach them to the four corners of the table by the legs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The rings are to be close to the border to hold the poles used to carry the table.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make the poles of acacia wood for carrying the table and cover them with gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make plates and dishes for the table, as well as pitchers and bowls for pouring out drink offerings. Make all of them out of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Place the Bread of the Presence on the table so it is always in my presence.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make a lampst and of pure, hammered gold. The whole of it is to be made of one piece—its base, shaft, cups, buds, and flowers.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It is to have six branches coming out of the sides of the lampst and, three on each side.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Have three cups shaped like almond flowers on the first branch, each with buds and petals, three on the next branch. Each of six branches that come out will have three cups shaped like almond flowers, all complete with buds and petals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the main shaft of the lampst and make four cups shaped like almond flowers, complete with buds and petals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the six branches that come out from the lampst and, place a bud under the first pair of branches, a bud under the second pair, and a bud under the third pair.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The buds and branches are to be made with the lampst and as one piece, hammered out of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make seven lamps and place them on the lampst and so they can light up the area in front of it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The wick tongs and their trays are to be made of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The lampst and and all these utensils will require a talent of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be sure to make everything according to the design you were shown on the mountain.
segments.speaker: The LORD
